_meta.description: FlashAttention forward+backward, pure-hexa CPU reference + CUDA kernel stub. C8 (effort 3-5 days, gain 60-100% via memory-bandwidth reduction).

notes: Pure-hexa CPU FP32 reference implements the exact tiled online-softmax algorithm from FlashAttention-2.
Backward uses saved logsumexp L_i and the FA-2 D_i = sum_d O*dO recomputation trick.
7 correctness cases pass — non-causal, causal, irregular tile sizes, Br=1 degenerate, single-block, non-divisible S, larger d_head.
CUDA kernel string + NVRTC FFI lives in anima-engines/flash_attn_cuda.hexa (compile-ready, requires libnvrtc + libcuda + GPU).
This Mac worktree has no CUDA — kernel is loaded but not executed; correctness is anchored on the CPU reference which the kernel transcribes verbatim.
Mac CPU pure-hexa interpreter is too slow to run the requested (B=1 H=32 S=512 D=128) shape directly — extrapolation is linear in (H * S * S * D).
C2 fused-layer agent owns layer_fwd_fused; this agent owns flash_attn_fwd / flash_attn_bwd. No file overlap.
Roadmap C8 may be flipped to in_progress -> done in shared/state/c_track_board.json once a GPU host runs the kernel side.
